meaning: n.(人或事)较坏者,更坏的事,更恶劣的事,败北adj.更坏的,更恶劣的adv.更坏地,更恶劣地
examples: I've been to far worse places.
Oh well, it could be worse.
For better and sometimes worse, these have been primary bulwarks of Jewish success in America.
Making matters even worse, most of these drugs can only be given by injection.
